description:
Name: Shar Pitur

Proficiency: Vehicles

Birth: Detritus

Age: Classified

Affiliation(s): Frauleins
title: Fraulein Der Krieg
unit_description: The assistant mechanic of Armored Element "Nosorog". She is usually reserved and apologetic on the job, but once she starts driving a vehicle with enough metal to encapsulate her from the outside world, she undergoes a total personality shift and turns into a courageous hotheaded pilot willing to push her machine to its limit. Prefers to be deployed in a walker with twin-linked autocannons and would apply absurd defensive modifications on her machines so she can drive it fearlessly towards the enemy line and cause chaos.
